overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character in futuristic armor ascending through an industrial stairwell bathed in red emergency lighting, then proceeding across a metal maintenance platform toward a doorway. The environment features concrete structures, metal railings, and electronic control panels in a hazy, atmospheric indoor facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial concrete stairwell with red ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up a long concrete staircase in a dimly lit industrial facility

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal edges ascending to upper level
rusted metal safety railing along the left side of stairs
faded paper notices and signs mounted on the right wall
large metal pipes running along the upper left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character ascending a concrete staircase in a narrow industrial stairwell. Red ambient lighting illuminates the upper reaches of the stairs, while metal railings line the left side and faded posters adorn the right wall. The atmosphere is hazy with visible atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance platform with control terminals

events.description: character reaches top of stairs and enters upper industrial platform area
character slows while approaching the metal doorway at the end of the platform

agents.ego_description: walking across the metal platform toward a doorway emitting red light

entered.detail: large industrial metal door with bright red light emanating from within
wall-mounted electronic terminals with glowing screens and buttons
large wooden spool with coiled industrial cables sitting on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an industrial maintenance platform at the top of the stairs. The space features a metal doorway ahead glowing with red light, electronic control panels on the right wall, and a large cable spool on the left. The character walks across the concrete floor toward the doorway, passing by the control terminals.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, atmospheric stairwell into an open industrial maintenance area. It begins with a character ascending a concrete staircase, where red ambient lighting cuts through a hazy fog and faded posters line the walls. As the character reaches the top, the confined space opens up onto a concrete platform featuring a large cable spool and electronic control panels. The camera then tracks the character's progress across the floor, moving past the terminals toward a glowing red metal doorway.
